title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0135 66 Church Road, Bristol, BS5 9JY
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Harry Cockram  Site address:  66 Church Road, Bristol, BS5 9JY  Description of proposed development:  Demolition of existing buildings on site and the erection of a three storey building comprising 6no flats, and 3no. Terraced dwellinghouses.  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 14 November 2025   Date by when representations must be made 18 December 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 9 January 2026   Decision date 6 January 2026     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 152 KB, 9 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 18 December 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, c/o QUADIENT, 69 Buckingham Avenue, Slough, SL1 4PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0135 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     3839 7a site sections  (PDF, 161 KB, 1 page)  3839 8 location plan  (PDF, 194 KB, 1 page)  3839 9 bin and bike store details  (PDF, 227 KB, 1 page)  251020 cover letter PR002716 FINAL  (PDF, 352 KB, 7 pages)  251020 FRA PR02716 FINAL  (PDF, 278 KB, 5 pages)  BNG exemption form  (PDF, 641 KB, 4 pages)  cil questions  (PDF, 491 KB, 6 pages)  completed app form  (PDF, 1.65 MB, 14 pages)  EEGSL CMRA Report B4918 66 Church Road Bristol  (PDF, 6.11 MB, 26 pages)  Energy Statement  (PDF, 1.09 MB, 8 pages)  RP 3277 - 66 Church Road - Bristol Façade Assessment - P01  (PDF, 7.67 MB, 20 pages)  3839 1 existing site plan  (PDF, 502 KB, 1 page)  3839 2a proposed site plan...
